summary:
You are given an array where each entry is the price of a stock on a given day. You may complete as many buy/sell transactions as you like, but you can hold at most one share at a time and must sell before buying again.

There is one extra rule: the day immediately after you sell is a cooldown day on which you are not allowed to buy. Return the maximum total profit you can achieve.

examples.explanation: Buy on day 0 (price 1), sell on day 2 (price 3), cool down on day 3, then buy on day 3... e.g. transactions [buy, sell, cooldown, buy, sell] yield profit 2 + 1 = 3.
With a single day there is no opportunity to sell, so the best profit is 0.

constraints: At most one share may be held at any time
The day after any sale is a mandatory cooldown with no buying
